summary: Completed frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control iteration 10 - Batch of functional UI fixes. All 18 requested features tested and verified. Key changes: 1) Plus menu completely rewritten with all items (Add files/photos, Add to Spaces, Add from GitHub, Skills, Connectors, Plugins, Research, Web search, Use style), 2) Spaces sub-menu shows 3 existing spaces (Files, Design, Development) with colored icons + 'New space name...' input + Add button, 3) Connectors sub-menu shows 12 connectors including desktop apps (VS Code, Figma, Slack, Chrome, Docker, Notion) with toggles, 4) Skills sub-menu shows 8 skills with 'Manage skills' and 'Add skill' links, 5) Settings page fully functional with Theme persistence, Data Controls toggles, Security 2FA + session management, MCP Server form, API Key form, 6) Customize page with Skills toggles, Manage Connectors link, Plugin catalog with category filters, 7) Agent sparkles icon REMOVED from InputBar.
passed_tests: + menu opens with all items: Add files/photos, Add to Spaces, Add from GitHub, Skills, Connectors, Plugins, Research, Web search, Use style
+ menu 'Add files or photos' has hidden file input for file picker
+ menu 'Add to Spaces' shows sub-menu with 3 existing spaces (Files, Design, Development) with colored icons
+ menu 'Add to Spaces' has 'New space name...' input and 'Add' button at bottom
+ menu 'Connectors' sub-menu shows 12 connectors including desktop apps (VS Code, Figma, Slack, Chrome Browser, Docker, Notion) with toggles
+ menu 'Connectors' has 'Manage connectors' link at bottom that navigates to /settings?tab=apps
+ menu 'Skills' sub-menu shows 8 skills (deep-research, code-review, web-scraper, file-manager, task-scheduler, mcp-builder, slack-gif-creator, canvas-design)
+ menu 'Skills' has 'Manage skills' and 'Add skill' links that navigate to /customize
+ menu 'Plugins' navigates to /customize
Settings General tab: Theme selector (Dark/Light/System) with persistence to Zustand state
Settings Connected Apps: 12 connectors listed with toggles including desktop apps
Settings Connected Apps: 'Add MCP Server' button shows form with name + URL inputs
Settings Connected Apps: 'Add API Key' button shows form with name + key inputs
Settings Data Controls: 3 functional toggles (Save history ON, Usage OFF, Memory ON)
Settings Data Controls: 'Delete all conversations' shows confirmation dialog with 'Delete all' button
Settings Security: 2FA toggle works
Settings Security: 'Manage' button shows 2 sessions (This device - Current, iPhone 16) with Revoke option
Customize page: Skills section with 8 skills and toggles
Customize page: 'Manage Connectors' card links to /settings?tab=apps
Customize page: Plugins section with category filters (All, Tools, Creative, Dev) and install/uninstall toggles
Agent sparkles icon REMOVED from InputBar (only + and Agent mode toggle remain)
Chat input and send still works (message sent, simulated response received)
Model selector works with hover-based providers/models (6 providers, Venice shows 31 models)
All sidebar navigation works (Chat, Agent, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize)
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18+ requested features tested and working. Key iteration 10 changes verified: 1) PlusMenu completely rewritten - opens ABOVE trigger (bottom-full), sub-menus appear to RIGHT, 2) Spaces sub-menu uses addSpace/assignThreadToSpace from Zustand, shows 3 default spaces (Files/Design/Development) with colored icons, has 'New space name...' input + Add button, 3) File picker via hidden input triggered by 'Add files or photos', 4) 12 connectors including desktop apps (VS Code, Figma, Slack, Chrome Browser, Docker, Notion), 5) Skills sub-menu with 'Manage skills' and 'Add skill' links to /customize, 6) SettingsPage fully functional: Theme persistence (dark/light/system), Data Controls (saveHistory/usageData/memoryEnabled toggles), Security (twoFactor toggle, session management with Manage/Revoke), MCP Servers form (name + URL), API Keys form (name + key), Delete all conversations with confirmation, 7) CustomizePage: Skills toggles, Manage Connectors link to /settings?tab=apps, Plugins with category filters (All/Tools/Creative/Dev) and install toggles, 8) Agent sparkles icon REMOVED from InputBar - only + button and Agent mode toggle remain. Note: 'Made with Emergent' badge may overlap model selector in conversation mode - this is a platform UI element.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response with streaming), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), toggleConnector/toggleSkill/togglePlugin (state updates), addMcpServer/addApiKey (state updates), clearAllThreads (state update), setTheme/setDataControl/setSecurity (state updates), addSpace/assignThreadToSpace (state updates)
